prompt: A clean, graphic anime illustration poster in a modern Japanese pop-design style, showing a handsome high school boy commuting home while listening to music. The composition is split into 3 tall vertical panels with slightly angled borders, each panel showing the same boy from a different side profile or three-quarter side view as if walking through the same suburban route. He has black short spiky hair, fair skin, a calm cool expression, wired earphones, and wears a white short-sleeve school shirt tucked into light blue-gray slacks with a belt. A semi-transparent crossbody bag with visible contents hangs at his side, and one hand is in his pocket in each pose. His face area is intentionally obscured by a soft square blur block in all 3 panels. The background is a bright summer after-school street scene in Japan with blue sky, white clouds, utility poles and power lines, chain-link fencing, green trees, a school building, a roadside path, and a railroad crossing signal. Use crisp line art, flat cel shading, pale blue and mint-green tones with black accents and small orange safety details. Overlay the whole image with stylish magazine-like typography, graphic stripes, dots, arrows, and signage. At the center, place a bold white rectangular sign with black border reading now plyaing, with a left arrow on the left and a right arrow on the right. Include visible English and Japanese text elements placed around the layout: top left "AFTER SCHOOL ROUTE", left vertical sign "帰り道→", upper middle text "LIKE THE SONG, LIKE MYSELF.", right vertical text "007 :::", right-side vertical sign "踏切注意→", bottom left "MUSIC IS MY ESCAPE", bottom right "KEEP THE BEAT GOING.", and bottom border text "EVERY DAY. DIFFERENT SOUNDTRACK." Add 4 small color dots at the lower right, 4 small rectangular color swatches at the lower left, and decorative black striping in multiple corners. The overall feel is stylish, youthful, urban, refreshing, and slightly editorial, like a playlist cover or social-media music post.
